name: Turkey Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Press stuffing into a 9-inch pie plate or quiche dish, forming a crust. Bake in a 400-degree oven for 10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, combine the meat and cheese.
3. In another bowl, beat together the eggs, evaporated milk, and 1/8 teaspoon pepper.
4. Sprinkle the meat-cheese mixture into the hot crust.
5. Pour the egg mixture on top.
6. Lower the temperature to 350 degrees and bake the quiche for 30 to 35 minutes or until the center is set.
7. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving. Garnish with tomato wedges if desired. Makes 6 servings.
